name: drone
description: Generated TGG ruleset: drone CST <-> Hub-IR. Bidirectional — the engine derives CST->IR and IR->CST from this one set (model a).

rules.name: R_drone_agent_user_comment
rules.documentation: drone: user `# foo` comment under agent <-> hub:comment lexical node

rules.name: R_drone_concurrency_user_comment
rules.documentation: drone: user `# foo` comment under concurrency <-> hub:comment lexical node

rules.documentation: drone: user `# foo` comment under condition <-> hub:comment lexical node

rules.documentation: drone: user `# foo` comment under pipeline <-> hub:comment lexical node

rules.documentation: drone: user `# foo` comment under resource <-> hub:comment lexical node

rules.name: R_drone_secret_user_comment
rules.documentation: drone: user `# foo` comment under secret <-> hub:comment lexical node

rules.name: R_drone_step_user_comment
rules.documentation: drone: user `# foo` comment under step <-> hub:comment lexical node

rules.name: R_drone_concept_trigger_branch_match
rules.documentation: drone: concept `trigger_branch_match` via path `trigger.branch.include` <-> hub:pipeline -has_trigger-> hub:trigger.attr[name=branches]

rules.name: R_drone_concept_trigger_tag_match
rules.documentation: drone: concept `trigger_tag_match` via path `trigger.event.include` <-> hub:pipeline -has_trigger-> hub:trigger.attr[name=branches]

rules.name: R_drone_concept_trigger_path_match
rules.documentation: drone: concept `trigger_path_match` via path `trigger.paths.include` <-> hub:pipeline -has_trigger-> hub:trigger.attr[name=paths]

rules.name: R_drone_concept_trigger_cron
rules.documentation: drone: concept `trigger_cron` via path `cron` <-> hub:pipeline -has_trigger-> hub:trigger.attr[name=schedule]
